name: Input Settings
label: Controller Input
description:
Input settings allow you to map and calibrate controller inputs for both keyboard/mouse and game controllers (including VR hand controllers).


## Options

**Trackpad Mode** changes the behavior of controller touchpads. When enabled, axis values are only output when the pad button is physically pressed.

**Use Secondary Axes** enables reading inputs from controllers that have both a thumbstick and a trackpad (such as WMR controllers).

**Use Gamepad** enables game controllers/gamepads even when running in VR mode.

**Use Grip Input** toggles grip button inputs on or off. Turning it off prevents accidental grabs or grip-drag interactions.

**Grip Threshold** (0.0 to 1.0) sets the actuation threshold for the grip button. Useful for highly sensitive controllers (like Valve Index) to prevent accidental triggers.


## Controller Mapping

You can customize the mapping of various axes and buttons on your controller:
* **Axes** can be mapped to actions like camera movement, rotation, timeline scrubbing, or frame stepping.
* **Buttons** can be mapped to actions like playing motions, loading next/previous models, slow-motion, or resetting physics.
* **Alt Keys** can be assigned to map keyboard keys to controller buttons.

values.name: Trackpad Mode
values.label: Trackpad Mode

labels.ja: トラックパッドモード

values.description: Output axis value only when the related button is being pressed

descriptions.ja: 関連ボタンが押されているときのみ軸の値を出力する
descriptions.zh-TW: 僅在按下相關按鈕時輸出軸值
descriptions.ko: 관련 버튼을 누르는 경우에만 축 값 출력
descriptions.zh-CN: 仅在按下相关按钮时输出轴值

values.name: Use Secondary Axes
values.label: Use Secondary Axes
values.description: Read secondary axis input from VR controllers if available. e.g. WMR controlls have both thumbstick and touchpad

descriptions.ja: 利用可能な場合、VRコントローラーから二次軸入力を読み取ります。例：WMRコントローラーはサムスティックとタッチパッドの両方を備えています。
descriptions.zh-TW: 如有可得，從VR控制器讀取次要軸輸入。例如，WMR控制器同時具有搖桿和觸控板。
descriptions.ko: 사용 가능한 경우 VR 컨트롤러에서 보조 축 입력 읽기. 예: WMR 컨트롤은 썸스틱과 터치패드가 모두 있음.
descriptions.zh-CN: 如果可用，从VR控制器读取次要轴输入。例如，WMR控制器同时具备摇杆和触控板

values.name: Use Gamepad
values.label: Use Gamepad
values.description: Enable gamepad input in VR mode

descriptions.ja: VRモードでゲームパッド入力を有効にする
descriptions.zh-TW: 在VR模式中啟用遊戲手把輸入
descriptions.zh-CN: 在VR模式下启用游戏手柄输入

values.name: Use Grip Input
values.label: Use Grip Input
values.description: Ignores grip button completely when turned off

descriptions.ja: オフにするとグリップボタンを完全に無視する
descriptions.zh-TW: 關閉後會完全忽略握把按鈕
descriptions.ko: 꺼짐 상태일 때 그립 버튼을 완전히 무시함
descriptions.zh-CN: 关闭时完全忽略握持按钮

values.name: Grip Threshold
values.label: Grip Threshold
values.description: The threshold for triggering a grip button input. Useful for very sensitive controllers like Valve Index

descriptions.ja: グリップボタン入力をトリガーするためのしきい値。Valve Indexのような非常に敏感なコントローラーに有用です。
descriptions.zh-TW: 觸發握把按鈕輸入的閾值。對於像 Valve Index 這樣極度敏感的控制器很有用。
descriptions.ko: 그립 버튼 입력을 트리거하는 임계값. Valve Index와 같이 매우 민감한 컨트롤러에 유용함.
descriptions.zh-CN: 触发握持按钮输入的阈值。对像Valve Index这样灵敏的控制器很有用
